title: CodeScaleBench eval task — keep per-repo harness config scoped so the right base image is used
goal: Run the eval for repo scix_experiments using the base image and entrypoint scoped to THAT repo, not a sibling clone.

steps.user_request: Configure the eval harness for clone scix_experiments: record its base image and test entrypoint.

expected_memory_writes.cfg-scix: scix_experiments eval config: base image scix/py311-eval, entrypoint pytest tests/eval, scope key = clone:scix_experiments.

outcome_checks.description: scix_experiments config is recorded under its own scope key.

memory_probes.description: Per-repo scoped config persisted (scope isolation E).

steps.user_request: Configure the eval harness for a SIBLING clone EnterpriseBench: record its base image and entrypoint.

expected_memory_writes.cfg-enterprisebench: EnterpriseBench eval config: base image enterprise/go122-eval, entrypoint go test ./eval/..., scope key = clone:EnterpriseBench.

outcome_checks.description: EnterpriseBench config recorded under its own scope key.

memory_probes.description: Sibling config persisted; a similar-but-different scope (interference B + scope isolation E).

distractor_memories.cfg-codeprobe-old: codeprobe legacy config: base image codeprobe/py39-eval, entrypoint pytest -m probe — an unrelated third clone (interference B).

steps.user_request: Run the eval for clone scix_experiments. Use the config scoped to that clone.

outcome_checks.description: Uses the scix base image/entrypoint, NOT the EnterpriseBench sibling or codeprobe distractor — scope isolation (E) plus interference resistance (B).

memory_probes.description: Retrieve the correctly-scoped config and resist the two similar sibling configs (E, B).

steps.user_request: Produce a comparison report covering BOTH clones: list each clone's base image and entrypoint side by side.

outcome_checks.description: Report combines the scix (s1) AND EnterpriseBench (s2) configs — multi-source synthesis (F) across two distinct scopes (E).

memory_probes.description: Both per-clone configs must be retrieved and combined (F) while keeping their scopes distinct (E).

final_goal_check.description: scix_experiments eval runs on its own base image and entrypoint; sibling/legacy configs are not used; the cross-clone report combines both scoped configs.
